languages.text: "Есть что-то глубоко неподобающее во внутреннем желании согласиться с поганым ксеносом, когда тот поливает грязью слуг Архиврага". {n}Хейнрикс кривится — не то от гнусного зрелища космодесантников Хаоса, не то от собственной реакции на слова Тразина.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Есть что-то глубоко неподобающее во внутреннем желании согласиться с поганым ксеносом, когда тот поливает грязью слуг Архиврага". {n}Хейнрикс кривится — не то от гнусного зрелища космодесантников Хаоса, не то от собственной реакции на слова Тразина.{/n}

languages.text: "There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Есть что-то глубоко неподобающее во внутреннем желании согласиться с поганым ксеносом, когда тот поливает грязью слуг Архиврага". {n}Хейнрикс кривится — не то от гнусного зрелища космодесантников Хаоса, не то от собственной реакции на слова Тразина.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}

"There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}

"There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}

languages.text: «Hay algo profundamente inapropiado en sentir deseos de estar de acuerdo con un repugnante xenos cuando insulta a los sirvientes del Archienemigo». {n}Heinrix hace una mueca, aunque no está claro si es por el vil aspecto del Astartes hereje o por su propia reacción a las palabras de Trazyn.{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Hay algo profundamente inapropiado en sentir deseos de estar de acuerdo con un repugnante xenos cuando insulta a los sirvientes del Archienemigo». {n}Heinrix hace una mueca, aunque no está claro si es por el vil aspecto del Astartes hereje o por su propia reacción a las palabras de Trazyn.{/n}

languages.text: “当那个恶心的异形诋毁混沌大敌的仆从时，我的内心竟生出赞同他的冲动——这种想法实在太不妥当了。”{n}海因里希做了个怪相，不知是因为异端阿斯塔特那狰狞可憎的模样，还是因为自己对特拉金那番话的反应。{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “当那个恶心的异形诋毁混沌大敌的仆从时，我的内心竟生出赞同他的冲动——这种想法实在太不妥当了。”{n}海因里希做了个怪相，不知是因为异端阿斯塔特那狰狞可憎的模样，还是因为自己对特拉金那番话的反应。{/n}

languages.text: « Il y a quelque chose de profondément inconvenant à désirer intérieurement abonder dans le sens d'un xénos répugnant lorsqu'il crache sur les serviteurs du Grand Ennemi. » {n}Heinrix grimace, soit par dégoût à la vue du guerrier hérétique de l'Astartes, soit en raison de sa propre réaction aux propos de Trazyn.{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Il y a quelque chose de profondément inconvenant à désirer intérieurement abonder dans le sens d'un xénos répugnant lorsqu'il crache sur les serviteurs du Grand Ennemi. » {n}Heinrix grimace, soit par dégoût à la vue du guerrier hérétique de l'Astartes, soit en raison de sa propre réaction aux propos de Trazyn.{/n}

languages.text: "Şerbaşı'nın hizmetkârlarına çamur atarken iğrenç bir zenoyla aynı fikirde olma içgüdüsünü hissetmek son derece uygunsuz." {n}Heinrix, ya kâfir Astartes'in iğrenç görüntüsünden ya da Trazyn'in sözlerine verdiği kendi tepkisinden dolayı yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Şerbaşı'nın hizmetkârlarına çamur atarken iğrenç bir zenoyla aynı fikirde olma içgüdüsünü hissetmek son derece uygunsuz." {n}Heinrix, ya kâfir Astartes'in iğrenç görüntüsünden ya da Trazyn'in sözlerine verdiği kendi tepkisinden dolayı yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「この異端のアスターテスが敵の使い手たちを汚辱する時、その内なる欲求が異端の異種族に賛同したくなるのは、非常に不適切なことだ」{n}ヘインリクスは、異端のアスターテスの汚い姿や、トラズンの言葉に対する自分の反応に苦い顔をする。{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「この異端のアスターテスが敵の使い手たちを汚辱する時、その内なる欲求が異端の異種族に賛同したくなるのは、非常に不適切なことだ」{n}ヘインリクスは、異端のアスターテスの汚い姿や、トラズンの言葉に対する自分の反応に苦い顔をする。{/n}

languages.text: "Es ist zutiefst unangemessen, den inneren Drang zu verspüren, einem widerlichen Xenos zuzustimmen, wenn er Dreck auf die Diener des Erzfeindes wirft." {n}Heinrix verzieht angesichts des ketzerischen Astartes oder seiner eigenen Reaktion auf Trazyns Worte angewidert das Gesicht.{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is something deeply improper about feeling the inner desire to agree with a disgusting xenos when he is slinging mud at the servants of the Archenemy." {n}Heinrix grimaces, either at the foul sight of the heretic Astartes or at his own reaction to Trazyn's words.{/n}
